title: helenium atacamense
intro: Helenium atacamense, also known as Atacama Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to the Atacama Desert in Chile. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helenium atacamense are attributed to its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions. Helenium atacamense can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
